summary: Frontend-only review of collapsible Banquet Management header. Code review of /app/frontend/src/pages/management/BanquetManagement.jsx and source-bundle inspection confirms the implementation matches the spec exactly. Live Playwright execution was blocked by severe rate-limiting (HTTP 429 from Cloudflare/backend) on the preview URL — every attempt to load /management/banquet timed out waiting for the page to render. Only one early run actually reached the page (it returned a stale cached bundle showing the OLD non-collapsible header). After `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend && sleep 12` the served React source DOES contain all six required testids (verified via curl of the JSX module), but subsequent browser loads were blocked by 429s.

verified_elements: H1 'Banquet & Event Services' with data-testid='bq-mgmt-title' is ALWAYS rendered inside the card top row (line 1171) — never gated by headerExpanded

Toggle button with data-testid='bq-mgmt-toggle-header' on the right; label flips between 'Hide' (ChevronUp) and 'Show controls' (ChevronDown) based on headerExpanded (lines 1186–1201). aria-expanded + aria-controls present.
Subtitle 'Halls, chairs & cutlery...', OperatorScopeFilter, and Refresh (data-testid='bq-mgmt-refresh-btn') are inside `{headerExpanded && (...)}` block (lines 1206–1219)
TabsList (Dashboard/Services/Packages/Communications) is wrapped in `{headerExpanded && (...)}` (lines 1223–1230) so it disappears when collapsed
Services-tab toolbar with data-testid='bq-mgmt-toolbar' (services-search-input, category-filter-select, ViewModeToggle, add-service-btn) is wrapped in `{headerExpanded && (...)}` (lines 1254–1286)
Active-tab pill data-testid='bq-mgmt-active-tab-pill' only renders when !headerExpanded; maps activeTab==='management' → label 'Services' (lines 1172–1177)

Filter pill data-testid='bq-mgmt-filter-active-pill' (amber, 'Filtered' label, SlidersHorizontal icon) only shows when collapsed AND activeTab==='management' AND (search || categoryFilter !== 'all') (lines 1178–1182)
Services grid (TabsContent value='management') renders OUTSIDE the headerExpanded gate, so cards remain visible while header is collapsed (lines 1290–1298)
Tab switching via the Tabs root works while expanded; when collapsed the TabsList is unmounted so the user physically cannot switch — pill reflects last active tab
code_review_findings.source_bundle_verification: curl of /src/pages/management/BanquetManagement.jsx through the preview URL returned all six required testids: bq-mgmt-title, bq-mgmt-toggle-header, bq-mgmt-active-tab-pill, bq-mgmt-filter-active-pill, bq-mgmt-refresh-btn, bq-mgmt-toolbar

critical_code_review_comments: Implementation is clean and minimally invasive — only adds a single boolean state plus two short conditional wrappers around existing chrome. No side-effects on data fetching, dialog, edit, or packages flows.
Accessibility: aria-expanded and aria-controls on the toggle button are properly wired to the panel id 'bq-mgmt-header-panel'. ChevronUp/Down icons + visible label give a clear affordance.

Defensive UX nicety: when collapsed and the Services tab has active filters, the amber `bq-mgmt-filter-active-pill` makes the otherwise-hidden filter state discoverable. Good pattern to keep if rolling out to other pages.
File is 1722 lines (~700-line guideline exceeded). Consider extracting the dialog form and the management toolbar into sub-components in a follow-up — not blocking for this UI experiment.
action_items: MAIN AGENT: Please self-verify in a clean incognito browser (Cmd+Shift+N), hard refresh once. Sign in as superadmin@oryno.com / testpassword123, navigate to /management/banquet and click the 'Hide' button next to the H1. Expected: subtitle + OperatorScopeFilter + Refresh + TabsList + toolbar all disappear; pill appears showing active tab; grid below stays. Click again to re-expand. Add a search term, collapse, confirm amber 'Filtered' pill appears.

Optional follow-up (NOT a blocker): split BanquetManagement.jsx (1722 LOC) into <ServicesToolbar>, <ServiceDialog>, <ServicesGrid> sub-components for maintainability before rolling this header pattern out to other management pages.

success_rate.frontend: Code review 100%; live UI execution blocked by 429 rate-limiting on preview URL

test_credentials: superadmin@oryno.com / testpassword123 — login API confirmed working (HTTP 200, access_token returned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The preview URL (cinema-management-p0.preview.emergentagent.com) was returning blanket HTTP 429 on virtually every /api/* request for the duration of this session, which makes Playwright UI flows extremely flaky — page never finishes hydration so React testids never appear. If you hit the same wall: (1) wait 2–3 minutes between runs, (2) `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend && sleep 12` to flush Vite stale bundle (recurring symptom called out by the main agent), (3) prefer single navigate + long wait_for_selector(timeout=60s) rather than many parallel actions which compound the rate limit. The implementation in BanquetManagement.jsx is verified correct via static review + source-bundle curl.
rca_of_the_issue: Not a product bug — environment-side throttling. The Banquet collapsible header code is correctly wired (state + 3 conditional wrappers + 2 conditional pills) and all 6 required data-testids ship in the Vite-served bundle. The earlier screenshot showing 'no toggle button' was a browser-cached stale bundle from before the change; supervisorctl restart frontend + sleep 12 cleared it (verified via curl on the live JSX module).
